leadText: Drill Peck (Japanese: ドリルくちばし Drill Beak) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Drill Peck inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. It can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Drill Peck can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 4 bonus appeal points if Peck was used in the previous turn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Stad2 A standard Flying -type attack. It is strong and highly likely to hit the target. G S C A strong, spinning-peck attack. R S E Colo A corkscrewing attack with the beak acting as a drill. XD A corkscrewing attack, with the beak acting as a drill. FR LG D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 A corkscrewing attack with the sharp beak acting as a drill. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A corkscrewing attack with a sharp beak acting as a drill. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A corkscrewing attack that strikes the target with a sharp beak acting as a drill.
